case_title: DEBBIE ODIYE VS. FIDELITY NATIONAL HOME WARRANTY COMPANY

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) LUIS DE LA ROCA APPEARS FOR DEFENDANT. FILED BY DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL HOME WARRANTY COMPANY
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ODIYE, DEBBIE AS TO DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL HOME WARRANTY COMPANY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY ODIYE, DEBBIE AS TO DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL HOME WARRANTY COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-24-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SEE SIGNATURE BOX. SERVED SEP-10-2024, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL HOME WARRANTY COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-24-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCTOBER 24, 2024. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL HOME WARRANTY IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY LUIS DE LA ROCA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CAROLYN GOLD. CLERK: SVT. DEPARTMENT 506.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-24-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ODIYE, DEBBIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL HOME WARRANTY COMPANY WARRANTY EXCLUDES LIABILITY FOR PERSONAL INJURY, AND DELAYS IN SCHEDULING BETWEEN CONTRACTOR AND POLICYHOLDER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
